title: rhabdouchos #4465
definition:
1) one who carries the rods i.e. the fasces
 2) a lictor, a public official who bore the fasces or staff and other
    insignia of office before a magistrate
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) one who carries the rods i.e. the fasces
 2) a lictor, a public official who bore the fasces or staff and other
    insignia of office before a magistrate

    NASB:  a rod holder, i.e. (a Roman) lictor (one holding the rod of office):
